assertions.text: Response runs 'clasp push --force' before deploying (push before deploy)
assertions.evidence: clasp push --force appears on the line before clasp deploy --description "Run $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd')"

assertions.text: Response includes 'clasp deploy --description' with a date-stamped description (e.g. yyyy-MM-dd format or $(Get-Date ...) expression)
Response clarifies that the web app URL stays stable and only the version number changes
assertions.evidence: The stable web app URL does not change — it automatically points to the newest deployment.
